main_title: JSON Bulk Importer - from AnkiVN with ❤️
chk_write_guids: Write __guid__ back into JSON after create/update
toolbar_import_json: Import a JSON file into the editor
toolbar_export_json: Export the current editor contents to a JSON file
toolbar_view_table: Open the current JSON as an editable table
toolbar_copy_prompt: Copy an AI prompt based on the selected Note Type
tooltip_media_config:
Configure which fields are Image/Audio.
When you paste a URL into that field, the addon downloads the media automatically.
tooltip_copy_prompt: Copy an XML-structured prompt for ChatGPT/Claude that generates JSON matching the selected Note Type.
tooltip_paste_excel: Paste TSV data from Excel/Sheets (first row = column headers)
tooltip_prefetch:
Test-download media for Image/Audio fields.
Green = success, Red = error (hover for details).
tooltip_write_guids: After importing into Anki, the addon writes the generated/matched __guid__ values back into the JSON so you can reuse them next time.
tooltip_get_deck_data: Export the selected deck into the JSON editor.
tooltip_include_stats: Also export created_at, modified_at, reps, lapses, interval, and ease.
tooltip_toggle_advanced: Open or close this advanced tools section
tooltip_generate_guid: Generate missing __guid__ values for the current JSON array.
tooltip_add_deck_to_json: Add the selected deck as __deck__ on cards that do not already have it.
tooltip_open_history: Open the folder that stores batch history JSON files.
tooltip_toggle_preview_mode: Switch to Preview Mode. The table becomes read-only and selected HTML cells are rendered below.
tooltip_toggle_edit_mode: Switch back to Edit Mode so table cells can be edited.
tooltip_save_update_json: Save table changes back to the JSON editor.
tooltip_cancel: Cancel and close without applying changes.
config_description:
Choose data type for each Field.
Image/Audio: just paste a URL or file path,
the addon will automatically download to collection.media.
msg_paste_min_lines: Need at least 2 lines (1 header line + 1 data line).
msg_no_media_fields:
No fields are configured as Image/Audio yet.
Please click 'Field Media Config' on the main screen first.
msg_json_must_array: JSON must be a non-empty Array of objects.
msg_item_not_object: Item #{index} is not a JSON object (dict).
msg_json_must_be_array:
JSON must be an Array of objects.
Example: [{"Front": "...", "Back": "..."}]
msg_prompt_copied:
XML prompt has been copied to clipboard.
Replace [QUANTITY] and [TOPIC] then paste into ChatGPT/Claude.
msg_fix_json:
Fix JSON syntax before opening table view:
{error}
msg_select_deck_for_export: Please select a deck to export.
msg_guids_written: __guid__ has been written back into the JSON.
core_notetype_not_found: Note type '{name}' not found and no cards to infer fields from
prompt_expert: You are a flashcard expert. Create [QUANTITY] flashcards about the topic [TOPIC].
prompt_format: Return the result as a JSON Array. Each object MUST have EXACTLY these keys: [{fields}].
prompt_image_field: For the field "{field}", return only the direct image URL (no markdown, no HTML tags).
prompt_audio_field: For the field "{field}", return only the direct audio file URL.
prompt_json_only: ONLY RETURN JSON, NO additional explanation.
lang_changed:
Language has been changed.
Please close and reopen the Addon to apply.
